overall.description: A cinematic video game scene showing a character sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast grassland valley with distant mountains. The character occasionally raises binoculars to observe the landscape while birds fly overhead in the clear summer sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook on grassy hillside with distant mountain views

events.description: character raises binoculars to eyes to survey the distant landscape
flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right
character raises binoculars again to scan the horizon

agents.ego_description: sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast valley, occasionally raising binoculars to survey the landscape

entered.detail: large gray rock formation where the character is seated, occupying the right foreground
hazy blue mountain range forming the horizon backdrop
clusters of green trees dotting the rolling hills of the valley
expansive green prairie stretching across the middle distance
fluffy white clouds scattered across the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide, sunlit prairie vista viewed from a rocky outcrop. A character sits in the right foreground, surveying the vast grassland valley dotted with scattered trees and framed by distant mountains. The character occasionally raises binoculars to scan the horizon while birds fly through the clear sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, expansive view of a sunlit prairie vista that emphasizes the scale of a vast grassland valley. It begins from a high vantage point on a rocky outcrop, where a character sits in the right foreground surveying the landscape. As the camera lingers, the view encompasses the valley floor dotted with scattered trees and framed by distant mountains under a clear summer sky. The scene remains focused on this serene horizon while birds fly overhead and the character occasionally raises binoculars to scan the distance.
